name: itsolpowers
description: ITSOL engineering skills and Claude Code subagents for task intake, implementation, debugging, review, security, infrastructure, and production readiness.

interface.shortDescription: ITSOL engineering workflows and review skills.
interface.longDescription: ITSOL Powers provides Codex skills for routing engineering tasks across implementation, debugging, self-review, security review, infrastructure design, deployment readiness, and incident analysis using ITSOL best-practice documents.
defaultPrompt: Use ITSOL Powers to classify this task and choose the right skills.
Review this change against ITSOL security and infrastructure practices.
Debug this issue using ITSOL task and incident workflows.
